title: 3M reports 2Q loss following ‘forever chemicals' settlement; adjusted earnings surprise to the upside
text: 3M Co (NYSE:MMM) has swung to a second-quarter loss after the company agreed to pay up to $10.3 billion over the next 13 years to settle legal disputes over toxic water contamination in the US. The company, known for products like Post-It notes and Scotch Tape, delivered sales of $8.3 billion for the three months to June 30, 2023, down 4.3% year-over-year.

title: 3M stock rallies as adjusted profit and sales beat expectations, and the earnings guidance was raised
text: Shares of 3M Co. MMM, -0.06% rallied 3.1% toward a four-month high in premarket trading Tuesday, after the consumer, industrial and health care products company reported second-quarter profit and sales that beat expectations and raised its full-year outlook. The company swung to a net loss of $6.84 billion, or $12.35 a share, from net income of $78 million, or 14 cents a share, in the year-ago period.
